narrative:
Hwang In-beom operates as a Defensive Midfield for South Korea. His overall rating stands at 7.14/10, ranking him in the top 5% of defensive midfields at this tournament. This strong rating is influenced by both his club form and his World Cup contributions.

His attacking output is significant, boasting 0.341 goals and 0.341 assists per 90 minutes at this World Cup. He combines this with solid defensive work, evidenced by 1.364 interceptions and 1.023 tackles per 90 minutes. While his expected goals per 90 stand at 0.134, his actual goals rate indicates clinical finishing.

Hwang In-beom plays a crucial box-to-box role for South Korea, influencing both ends of the pitch. Scouts and fans should watch for his continued ability to deliver goals and assists. His defensive contributions, particularly his interceptions, will also be vital in upcoming games.
